Chronology of every recorded fact about [[King Zakareth the Sixth]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Zakareth the Sixth is the Morning and Evening Star of the Damascan Kingdom.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Zakareth the Sixth remains on the throne of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Zakareth the Sixth is His Majesty.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Zakareth the Sixth is the father of Talos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Leah is appointed Successor to King Zakareth the Sixth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Zakareth the Sixth was the Damascan Successor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — King Zakareth the Sixth is a warrior-king who wields a gold-headed spear and a large black shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — King Zakareth the Sixth wears black and gold armor decorated with rubies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — King Zakareth the Sixth wears a tall, spiked, black-and-gold crown with a single ruby above his forehead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Legends say the King of Damasca has a red eye that can see hearts, spirits, or the future.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — King Zakareth the Sixth has one good eye and wears a black eyepatch over the other.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — King Zakareth the Sixth is supported by the full might of Ragnarus.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — King Zakareth the Sixth is a ruler Leah must deal with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — King Zakareth the Sixth is the Incarnation of Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Zakareth the Sixth is accused of murdering Kai and corrupting Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — King Zakareth the Sixth has skin with gold-and-ruby designs and a rolling fireball of crimson for a stone eye.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
